title: EddyPro Sample Datasets
license: LI-COR public sample data; review upstream terms before redistribution
source_note: Official LI-COR EddyPro product page links to this public Box folder as EddyPro Sample Data. The folder contains EddyPro sample data.zip.

qc_mapping.reason: The public LI-COR archive is retained as an acquisition candidate until it is downloaded, unpacked, inspected, normalized, and registered as an official raw bundle.

known_limitations: The repository records the official public source and download recipe, but does not store the 88.6 MB ZIP in git.
The archive is not a parity fixture until raw input, EddyPro project/settings, official output, normalized reference, provenance, and closure acceptance are all present in one registered bundle.
Expected SHA-256 is intentionally blank until the operator downloads the archive and records the local hash in an auditable acquisition artifact.

candidate_bundles.license: LI-COR public sample data; review upstream terms before redistribution
promotion_blockers: Archive contents have not yet been unpacked and mapped to official_raw_fixture_bundle.json roles.
No normalized reference/provenance pair has been generated from this archive yet.
No official_raw_closure_run acceptance artifact has been produced from this archive yet.
